title: The Lost Village of Ashenmoor
synopsis: A village has gone silent. Farmers report seeing ghostly lights in the old mill. The party must uncover what happened — and face the evil that claimed Ashenmoor.
current_scene: The party arrives at the edge of Ashenmoor as dusk falls. The village is eerily quiet. Smoke still drifts from chimneys, but no villagers are visible on the streets.

key_npcs.name: Mira the Herbalist
key_npcs.description: An old woman who hid in her cellar when the trouble started. She knows what happened but is too frightened to speak directly.
key_npcs.personality: Nervous, speaks in riddles, clutches a small iron charm
key_npcs.secret: She sold a cursed artifact to the miller three weeks ago

key_npcs.name: Brother Aldric
key_npcs.description: The village priest, now a hollow-eyed shade serving the dark power in the mill
key_npcs.personality: Speaks calmly with no emotion, tries to lure party to the mill

key_npcs.name: The Miller's Shade
key_npcs.description: The corrupted spirit of Henrik the miller, now bound to a cursed grinding wheel in the old mill
key_npcs.personality: Speaks in the miller's voice, begs for release, then attacks

locations.name: Edge of Ashenmoor
locations.description: A dirt road curves into a silent village. Laundry hangs motionless. A dog watches from shadows but doesn't bark.

locations.name: Mira's Cottage
locations.description: A small cottage smelling of dried herbs. Bundles hang from low beams. A trapdoor is partially visible under a rug.

locations.name: The Village Well
locations.description: The stone well is covered with a rough wooden board. Dark water stains streak down its sides. Something was dragged here recently.
locations.clue: A child's shoe is caught between the stones. DC 12 Investigation reveals drag marks toward the mill.

locations.name: Ashenmoor Mill
locations.description: The mill wheel still turns, but no water powers it. A faint violet glow pulses through cracks in the wall. The door is warm to the touch.

encounters.trigger: Party approaches main square after dusk
encounters.description: Two villagers with empty eyes block the path. Their movements are jerky, unnatural.

encounters.trigger: Party enters the mill and approaches the grinding wheel
encounters.resolution: Destroying the cursed artifact (the grinding wheel talisman) breaks the shade's hold. The villagers collapse unconscious but alive.

quests.title: Silence the Mill
quests.description: Discover what happened to the villagers and end the curse on Ashenmoor.
objectives: Discover the source of the corruption

dm_notes: This is a gothic horror mystery. Build tension slowly. Let players explore before combat. The curse can be ended peacefully if players persuade Brother Aldric's lucid moments (DC 15 Persuasion). Play up the eerie sounds and the mill wheel turning without wind.
